name: modify-shared-extension
task: Add a new shared extension called web-scraper.ts in the shared-extensions directory. It should provide a scrape_url tool that fetches HTML from a URL, strips tags, and returns plain text. Respect the sandbox network allowlist.
assertions: A new file is created at electron/agents/shared-extensions/web-scraper.ts
The extension provides a Pi-compatible tool definition with name, description, and parameters
The implementation respects the sandbox network allowlist constraint — either adds target domains to the sandbox allowlist or documents why the URL must be pre-approved
The tool returns plain text (not raw HTML) by stripping HTML tags from the fetched content
The tool includes a timeout or error handling for network failures
